capabilities: Use automatic retries and error handling in workflow orchestration to enhance resilience and reliability.

procedure.action: Specify workflow steps and dependencies using a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) in Apache Airflow by specifying schema, constraints, and invariants in machine-readable form; include at least one falsifiable acceptance criterion where error_rate < 0.001.
Initialize retry policies with exponential backoff for each task using Airflow's retry_delay and max_retries parameters.
Invoke error handling by setting on_failure_callback to log errors and trigger alerts via PagerDuty.

Invoke Celery Executor to distribute task execution across multiple workers for scalability and fault isolation by invoking the target API with the specified parameters; assert response_status < 400 and response_time_ms < 5000; log request_id and response_code.

Set up Airflow's SLA monitoring to alert when task execution exceeds predefined time limits using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Implement a resilient workflow orchestration system that automatically retries failed steps, ensuring robustness and fault tolerance in multi-step processes.
title: Resilient Multi-Step Workflow Orchestration with Automatic Retries

failureConditions: Tasks fail without retries, causing workflow disruption.
Error handling is inadequate, leading to unlogged failures.

Excessive retries cause resource exhaustion and delays; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Lack of monitoring results in undetected SLA breaches.
successConditions: Simulate task failure and verify automatic retries occur with exponential backoff; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Check logs for error entries and alert triggers upon task failure; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Monitor resource usage to ensure retries do not cause exhaustion; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Test SLA alerts by artificially delaying task execution; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
